headline: Domino's names veteran executive as new CEO amid slowing pizza sales
summary: Domino's named chief operating officer and US president Joe Jordan as its next CEO. The stock is down 30% year to date.

raw.headline: Domino's names veteran executive as new CEO amid slowing pizza sales
raw.summary: Domino's named chief operating officer and US president Joe Jordan as its next CEO. The stock is down 30% year to date.

headline: Captain D's and PepsiCo Launch Alaska Family Cruise Sweepstakes Celebrating America's Fishing Heritage and 250 Years of American Pride
summary: This summer, Captain D's and PepsiCo are teaming up to celebrate America's fishing heritage, family traditions and the spirit of adventure with the launch of the Alaska Family Cruise Sweepstakes.

raw.headline: Captain D's and PepsiCo Launch Alaska Family Cruise Sweepstakes Celebrating America's Fishing Heritage and 250 Years of American Pride
raw.summary: This summer, Captain D's and PepsiCo are teaming up to celebrate America's fishing heritage, family traditions and the spirit of adventure with the launch of the Alaska Family Cruise Sweepstakes.

headline: Less Volume, More Premium: Post-Ozempic Economics Are Killing The Quantity Model
summary: As millions take GLP-1 drugs, packaged food giants face declining volumes while protein brands and specialty grocers win.

raw.headline: Less Volume, More Premium: Post-Ozempic Economics Are Killing The Quantity Model
raw.summary: As millions take GLP-1 drugs, packaged food giants face declining volumes while protein brands and specialty grocers win.

summary: Dividend Kings rebound in June, nearly matching SPY YTD.

headline: PepsiCo (PEP) Faces Softer Consumption Trends, According to Deutsche Bank
summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) is included among the Top 12 Dividend Stocks to Buy According to Billionaire Cliff Asness. On July 18, Deutsche Bank lowered its price recommendation on PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) to $168 from $173. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The move came ahead of the company’s fiscal second-quarter earnings report. The […]
